title: AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER 5 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF NAGA PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE âCHARTER DAY OF THE CITY OF NAGAâ

chunks.text:
109 OG No. 14, 2319 (April 8, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10357, January 09, 2013 ]

AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER 5 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF NAGA PROVINCE OF CEBU TO BE KNOWN AS THE âCHARTER DAY OF THE CITY OF NAGAâ

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. September 5 of every year is hereby declared to be a special working public holiday in the City of Naga, Province of Cebu to commemorate its founding day and to be known as the âCharter Day of the City of Nagaâ.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on November 13, 2012 and October 15, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 09 2013

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
